name: star-control
description: Expose ready Star-Control operations to Codex with a native project-tool fallback.

interface.shortDescription: Use ready Star-Control operations with native fallback.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to the installed Star-Control MCP gateway, invokes only ready actions, and keeps normal development work available through native project tools when Star-Control cannot act.
defaultPrompt: Use ready Star-Control operations for this task; otherwise continue with native project tools.
